message:
feat: implement ZADD options, LPOS full, Pub/Sub state, SCRIPT cache, CLIENT/SLOWLOG/SAVE runtime commands, and 8 new conformance suites

fr-command (326 insertions):
- Implement ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH option parsing with mutual exclusivity
  validation (NX+XX, NX+GT/LT are errors per Redis semantics)
- Extend LPOS from basic 3-arg form to full Redis API: RANK (positive and
  negative for forward/reverse scan), COUNT (0 = all matches, n = up to n),
  MAXLEN (limit scan window), with proper error messages matching Redis
- Implement LOLWUT with VERSION parameter and deterministic ASCII art
  generation (seed-based pattern using version number, 40x12 grid)
- Upgrade Pub/Sub commands (SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE, PSUBSCRIBE, PUNSUBSCRIBE,
  PUBLISH, PUBSUB) from stateless stubs to stateful implementations backed by
  Store subscription tracking; PUBSUB CHANNELS now supports glob filtering,
  NUMSUB returns real counts, NUMPAT tracks pattern count
- Implement SCRIPT LOAD (computes SHA-1, caches script body), SCRIPT EXISTS
  (checks cache by SHA-1 hex), SCRIPT FLUSH (clears cache); EVALSHA now checks
  script cache before returning NOSCRIPT
- Implement OBJECT IDLETIME using per-entry last_access_ms tracking (returns
  idle seconds), split from FREQ handler; FREQ returns 0 (no LFU tracking)
- Fix SET encoding detection: set listpack threshold now also checks member
  length <= 64 bytes (matching Redis ziplistEntry max)

fr-store (504 insertions, significant refactor):
- Add Entry::new() constructor and Entry::touch() method for LRU access tracking;
  all Entry construction sites refactored from struct literals to Entry::new()
  (propagates last_access_ms throughout the codebase)
- Add ZaddOptions struct (nx/xx/gt/lt/ch flags) and zadd_with_options() method
  implementing full Redis ZADD semantics: NX skips existing, XX skips new,
  GT/LT conditionally update scores, CH changes return count to include updates
- Add lpos_full() with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN: forward scan for positive rank,
  reverse scan for negative rank, skip-based rank matching, configurable result
  limit and scan window
- Add object_idletime() and touch_key() for LRU idle time queries
- Add script cache: script_load() with pure-Rust SHA-1 implementation (no
  external crate), script_exists(), script_flush(), script_get()
- Add Pub/Sub state management: subscribe/unsubscribe/psubscribe/punsubscribe
  with subscription count tracking, publish() with channel and pattern matching,
  pubsub_channels/numsub_count/numpat query methods
- Add glob_match() helper for pattern-based Pub/Sub channel matching

fr-runtime (384 insertions):
- Add CLIENT command handler: SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO (real client info
  line with tracked state), NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH flags, REPLY, KILL, PAUSE/UNPAUSE,
  TRACKING, CACHING subcommands
- Add RESET command: clears client name, flags, transaction state, re-auths as
  default user, returns +RESET
- Add SLOWLOG command: GET (with count limit, reverse chronological), LEN,
  RESET, HELP subcommands; backed by ring buffer with configurable threshold
  (slowlog-log-slower-than, default 10ms) and max length (128)
- Add SAVE/BGSAVE (records last save timestamp), LASTSAVE (returns saved
  timestamp), BGREWRITEAOF, SHUTDOWN (with NOSAVE/SAVE/NOW/FORCE flag
  validation) commands
- Add per-client state: client_id (monotonic via atomic counter), client_name,
  no_evict/no_touch flags, slowlog entry buffer with ID counter
- Expand RuntimeSpecialCommand enum and both classify functions (length-based
  and linear) for all new command keywords

Conformance (8 new fixture suites, 730+ total cases):
- New: core_bitmap.json (248 lines) - SETBIT, GETBIT, BITCOUNT, BITPOS, BITOP,
  BITFIELD operations
- New: core_client.json (170 lines) - CLIENT SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/NO-EVICT/
  NO-TOUCH/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE
- New: core_connection.json (224 lines) - PING, ECHO, SELECT, DBSIZE, COMMAND
  COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, RESET, QUIT
- New: core_expiry.json (338 lines) - PTTL/TTL semantics, EXPIRE/PEXPIRE,
  EXPIREAT/PEXPIREAT, PERSIST, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME
- New: core_generic.json (653 lines) - TYPE, DEL, EXISTS, RENAME, RENAMENX,
  OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME, RANDOMKEY, KEYS, SCAN, COPY, UNLINK,
  TOUCH, DUMP, SORT
- New: core_hyperloglog.json (173 lines) - PFADD, PFCOUNT, PFMERGE
- New: core_server.json (104 lines) - SLOWLOG GET/LEN/RESET, SAVE, BGSAVE,
  LASTSAVE, BGREWRITEAOF, DBSIZE, LOLWUT
- New: core_transaction.json (309 lines) - MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD, WATCH/UNWATCH,
  nested MULTI error, DISCARD outside MULTI error, queued command execution
- Expanded: core_strings.json (+238 lines) - SET NX/XX/GET/KEEPTTL options,
  MSET/MGET, MSETNX, GETDEL, GETEX EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/PERSIST, SETNX, SETEX,
  PSETEX, OBJECT ENCODING for strings
- Expanded: core_list.json (+97 lines) - LPOS with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN, negative
  rank, COUNT 0 for all matches, MAXLEN scan limiting
- Expanded: core_zset.json (+175 lines) - ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH combinations,
  ZADD NX+XX mutual exclusivity error, ZRANDMEMBER with/without COUNT
- Added 9 new smoke test functions to tests/smoke.rs for all new fixture suites
- Updated FEATURE_PARITY.md: conformance harness now lists 18 suites (730+
  cases), added ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH and LPOS RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN to command
  dispatch notes, listed all new fixture files

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,13 +15,13 @@ Non-negotiable policy:
 
 | Feature Family | Status | Notes |
 |---|---|---|
-| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 215+ commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS, SET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/KEEPTTL/NX/XX/GET), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP, LPOP/RPOP with COUNT), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD, SRANDMEMBER with COUNT, SPOP with COUNT), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZRANGESTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD, ZRANGE with BYSCORE/BYLEX/REV/LIMIT/WITHSCORES, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with WITHSCORES/LIMIT, ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with COUNT), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD with full bit manipulation), SORT/SORT_RO (BY/GET/LIMIT/ALPHA/STORE), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ/HELP, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY, LOLWUT, WAITAOF, COMMAND with COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, READONLY/READWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE/TRACKING/CACHING/NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH), CLUSTER (INFO/MYID/SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES/KEYSLOT/RESET), REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF, FUNCTION (LIST/STATS/DUMP/FLUSH/DELETE/HELP), Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams (XADD/XLEN/XDEL/XTRIM/XREAD/XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XPENDING/XACK/XSETID/XINFO/XGROUP/XRANGE/XREVRANGE), COPY, DUMP/RESTORE stubs, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB, SSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE/SPUBLISH), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), EVAL/EVALSHA/SCRIPT stubs; exclusive score bounds via `(` prefix supported, SCAN TYPE filter, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision fix, MSETNX/COPY/OBJECT conformance fixes, ZRANDMEMBER with COUNT/WITHSCORES, HRANDFIELD with COUNT/WITHVALUES; missing: Lua scripting engine, full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
+| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 215+ commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS, SET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/KEEPTTL/NX/XX/GET), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP, LPOP/RPOP with COUNT), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD, SRANDMEMBER with COUNT, SPOP with COUNT), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZRANGESTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD, ZRANGE with BYSCORE/BYLEX/REV/LIMIT/WITHSCORES, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with WITHSCORES/LIMIT, ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with COUNT), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD with full bit manipulation), SORT/SORT_RO (BY/GET/LIMIT/ALPHA/STORE), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ/HELP, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY, LOLWUT, WAITAOF, COMMAND with COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, READONLY/READWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE/TRACKING/CACHING/NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH), CLUSTER (INFO/MYID/SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES/KEYSLOT/RESET), REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF, FUNCTION (LIST/STATS/DUMP/FLUSH/DELETE/HELP), Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams (XADD/XLEN/XDEL/XTRIM/XREAD/XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XPENDING/XACK/XSETID/XINFO/XGROUP/XRANGE/XREVRANGE), COPY, DUMP/RESTORE stubs, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB, SSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE/SPUBLISH), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), EVAL/EVALSHA/SCRIPT stubs; exclusive score bounds via `(` prefix supported, SCAN TYPE filter, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision fix, MSETNX/COPY/OBJECT conformance fixes, ZRANDMEMBER with COUNT/WITHSCORES, HRANDFIELD with COUNT/WITHVALUES, ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH options, LPOS with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN; missing: Lua scripting engine, full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
 | Core data types and keyspace | in_progress | String, Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set, HyperLogLog, and Geo data types implemented with full WRONGTYPE enforcement; Streams fully implemented (`XADD`, `XLEN`, `XDEL`, `XTRIM`, `XREAD`, `XREADGROUP`, `XCLAIM`, `XAUTOCLAIM`, `XPENDING`, `XACK`, `XSETID`, `XINFO STREAM/GROUPS/CONSUMERS`, `XGROUP CREATE/DESTROY/SETID/CREATECONSUMER/DELCONSUMER`, `XRANGE`, `XREVRANGE`) |
 | TTL and eviction behavior | in_progress | lazy expiry and `PTTL` semantics scaffolded (`-2/-1/remaining`) |
 | RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract scaffolded; full replay fidelity pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime; full parameter surface and ACL CAT/GENPASS/LOG pending |
-| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites |
+| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (730+ core conformance cases) |
 | Benchmark + optimization artifacts | in_progress | round1 + round2 baseline JSON, syscall profile, and expanded golden checksum artifacts added |
 | Full command/API surface closure | not_started | program-level closure row; all deferred families must roll up here before release sign-off |
